notes:
Runs if you bypass the laucher, set launch options to
%command%/../Binaries/Win64/WoolfeGame.exe
Minor ground texture issues only at the start of the forest.
title: Woolfe - The Red Hood Diaries

cpu: AMD A10-7870K Radeon R7, 12 Compute Cores 4C+8G
notes:
Game runs perfectly by bypassing the launcher like someone said in a previous report, gamepad and achievements included.
Just let it download, install and fail to launch its first time, then add "%command%/../Binaries/Win64/WoolfeGame.exe" to the launch parameters and enjoy the game.
It will probably fail again one more time after adding the launch parameter but from 2nd time onward it will run with no problem.
title: Woolfe - The Red Hood Diaries

notes: As per other recommendations, disable the launcher using launch options %command%/../Binaries/Win64/WoolfeGame.exe - with that, it's perfectly fine and playable (didn't play all through in Proton yet)
title: Woolfe - The Red Hood Diaries

notes: Works well after setting "%command%/../Binaries/Win64/WoolfeGame.exe" launch parameter
title: Woolfe - The Red Hood Diaries
